\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Instance-level (local) stability: per-instance agreement across the three models (single run, 30 instances). Mean $\rho$ = mean over instances of mean pairwise Spearman; Prop.\ stable = fraction of instances with mean pairwise $\rho \geq 0.9$; Mean min Jaccard = mean over instances of minimum pairwise top-5 Jaccard; Prop.\ top-5 identical = fraction of instances where all three models have the same top-5 set.}
  \label{tab:local}
  \begin{tabular}{lcccc}
    \toprule
    Dataset    & Mean $\rho$ (std)   & Prop.\ stable & Mean min Jaccard & Prop.\ top-5 identical \\
    \midrule
    California & 0.78 (0.10) & 13\%  & 0.66 & 10\% \\
    Adult      & 0.70 (0.22) & 17\%  & 0.73 & 20\% \\
    Titanic    & 0.70 (0.17) & 3\%  & 0.66 & 13\% \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
